title: Permanent device reservations per product — sitches-ios, fitkind-ios slug-based allocation
description:
Add first-class permanent reservation support so specific products can claim well-known devices without fighting other work.

Acceptance criteria:
- simemu supports stable product-owned reservations for named iOS and Android devices
- reservation metadata survives monitor restarts
- claim flows respect reserved pools before general allocation
- documentation explains how products opt in to reserved devices
acceptanceCriteria: stable product-owned reservations can be configured
claim flows prefer reserved pools when applicable
reservation setup is documented for downstream repos
